Off Calendar Apr-21-2023 Continued To Jul-19-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Arthur Lipton, Esq. 415-362-6286 Lipton & Piper for Plaintiff.
Henry Yu, Esq. 415-398-8308 CCD Law Group P.C. for Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court's tentative ruling was to take the matter off-calendar. The Court shares its views. Defense counsel Mr. Yu apprises the court of the status of the meet and confer. Mr. Lipton voices concerns on re-setting the matter. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT RODNEY LEUNG, TONY WONG, LI LI DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT.

The Court permits Mr. Yu to file a revised declaration and to re-set the motion.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-15-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT RODNEY LEUNG, TONY WONG, LI LI DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT

No appearance.

The tentative ruling was adopted.

DEFENDANT RODNEY LEUNG, TONY WONG, LI LI's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT is

Off calendar. The Yu declaration does not show that the parties met and conferred in person or by telephone and therefore, does not comply with CCP 430.41. The parties are ordered to meet and confer and comply with the statute. Defendants' response to the complaint is now due by March 14, 2023.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (302/RBU)
